name: ESRF.net Validation Lab
description: Hidden, non-indexed environment for validating future ESRF.net pages, forms and features against the Cloudflare Pages branch preview. Not for public traffic.
rules: Every module page MUST include <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow"> and <meta name="googlebot" content="noindex,nofollow">.
Modules MUST NOT be linked from public navigation, footer, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, news-data.json, editorials list, index.html or any submit page.
Modules MUST display a TEST/VALIDATIE banner. No real sensitive or operational data may be entered.
Every module MUST have an owner and exit criteria before being promoted to main.
Promotion to main requires explicit approval on the draft PR; the test branch alone is never auto-merged.

modules.title: Gesimuleerde ESRF.net home (validatie-bezoekersreis)
modules.purpose: Gesimuleerde ESRF.net-startpagina die qua header, hero, footer en typografie aansluit op productie (index.html, style.css). Een subtiele staging-bar bovenaan en kleine 'Nieuw in validatie'-pillen markeren alleen de vernieuwde routes (geïntegreerd opgaveformulier, editorial bijdrage). Productie index.html is niet gewijzigd.
exitCriteria: Look & feel volgt productie (mast, hero, foundation, sectors, featured editorial, join, foot); alleen subtiele staging-bar en 'Nieuw in validatie'-pillen.
CTA's leiden naar submit-validation.html (organisatie / editorial / beide).
Geen publieke navigatie, footer, sitemap of robots verwijst hierheen.
Redactie keurt copy en NL-teksten goed.

modules.title: Opgavepad — validatievariant (redirect/landing naar submit-validation)
modules.purpose: Validatievariant van het klassieke opgavepad. Eenvoudige landingspagina die binnen 6 seconden doorstuurt naar submit-validation.html en handmatige CTA's biedt. De echte productiepagina request-listing.html blijft ongewijzigd.
exitCriteria: Meta refresh + handmatige CTA werken naar submit-validation.html.
TEST/VALIDATIE banner zichtbaar; geen wijziging aan productie request-listing.html.
Geen publieke link naar deze pagina.

modules.title: Regional Editorial Contributor Intake
modules.purpose: Validate the hidden contributor intake form for regional editorial submissions (Leadership Lessons, In het zonnetje, Regional Field Notes).
exitCriteria: Form validates required fields and honeypot blocks bots.
Local preview JSON renders correctly without backend submission.
Editorial reviewers approve content of banner, workflow note and field labels.

modules.title: Geïntegreerde opgave + editorial bijdrage (uitbreiding bestaand opgaveformulier)
modules.purpose: Prototype: bestaand atlas-opgaveformulier (request-listing.html) uitgebreid met optionele editorial bijdrage in één geïntegreerd formulier (organisatie / editorial / beide). Toont ook een aanbevolen architectuur voor veilige verwerking via Cloudflare Pages Function + private GitHub issue.

labButton.label: LAB-opslag (preview-only) — POST /api/intake-test
labButton.purpose: Knop in de previewstap die uitsluitend op preview-hostnames (*.esrf-clean.pages.dev / localhost) zichtbaar is en de payload met lab_test:true en het verplichte 'ESRF Lab Test'-prefix op contact.organisation én contact.name naar /api/intake-test stuurt. Notificatie is op deze route altijd uit; Directory_Master wordt nooit aangeraakt.
uiStatusMessages: LAB-rij toegevoegd aan de spreadsheet (LAB_*) of LAB DRY-RUN melding bij ontbrekende secrets.
Productie (404) en niet-bereikbaar zijn expliciet gemarkeerd in de UI.

exitCriteria: Modus-keuze (organisatie / editorial / beide) toont en valideert de juiste velden, incl. minimale lengte 20 op de korte editorial samenvatting.
Lokale preview rendert correct als JSON, tekst, en kopieerbare samenvatting; niets wordt verzonden.
Architectuurblok (Pages Function + Turnstile + private GitHub issue) is duidelijk en beoordeeld door redactie.
Wouter / redactie keurt de geïntegreerde UX en NL-teksten goed.
LAB-opslagknop is alleen zichtbaar op preview-hostnames; productie-bezoekers zien hem niet en de backend zou een eventuele directe POST hoe dan ook met 404 weigeren.

node functions/api/submit-validation-payload.test.mjs slaagt — bevestigt dat de buildLabBody-helper de juiste prefix, lab_test marker en payloadvelden produceert en dat /api/intake-test deze accepteert in org/editorial/both mode.

modules.title: Lab-automation voor /api/intake — workflow + LAB_* tabs + minimale notificatie
modules.readinessNote: Operational decision recorded 2026-04-26 14:46 UTC (event evt_sheet_monitoring_selected_20260426_1446): for the current lab phase, redactie notifications are handled by PERIODIC SHEET MONITORING of the Drive spreadsheet — NOT by automatic email. The user explicitly confirmed this is acceptable as the operational mode. The operational queue is the LAB_Intake_Submissions, LAB_Editorial_Intake and LAB_Workflow_Events tabs; the procedure for the redactie monitor is documented in the LAB_Instructions tab of the same Drive spreadsheet. Automatic email remains DISABLED until a minimal-rights Microsoft 365 Graph send-only Mail.Send route (or equivalent authenticated SMTP / mailrelay with SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment) is approved and passes a manually-delivered test under minimal-rights consent. Backend, LAB_* tabs and dry-run flow verified end-to-end on 2026-04-25 (submission sub_moelllvt_i21b). First successful sheet-only LAB write via /api/intake-test on 2026-04-26 (sub-test_mofow7u5_4dzv → LAB_Intake_Submissions row 4, LAB_Editorial_Intake row 3). Sheet intake remains ACTIVE. Automatic minimal-notification route via Google Apps Script MailApp was tested on 2026-04-26 with operator probe submission sub_moftdrju_f8lk but delivery to office@esrf.net was NOT CONFIRMED; under rollback event evt_unconfirmed_google_mailrelay_disabled_20260426_1401 the Cloudflare Pages Preview env vars INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK and INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO were removed/disabled. Later on 2026-04-26 (14:21) an attempt to authorize an Outlook / Microsoft 365 connector for office@esrf.net was REJECTED by the operator at the Microsoft consent screen because the connector requested broad / full mailbox access instead of a minimal send-only scope; this is recorded as decision event evt_outlook_broad_scope_rejected_20260426_1421. Refusing the broad consent is the correct security decision — the channel only needs Mail.Send. No Outlook connector was authorized; no env vars were set; no test emails were sent; production was not touched. The Google Apps Script MailApp route is therefore marked disabled / delivery-unconfirmed and is NOT a production route, AND the broad-scope Outlook connector path is REJECTED. The recommended next notification routes are minimal-rights only: (1) Microsoft Graph app registration with send-only Mail.Send as office@esrf.net (no Mail.Read / Mail.ReadWrite / full_access_as_app, mailbox-scoped via Exchange Online ApplicationAccessPolicy), (2) authenticated SMTP / mailrelay for office@esrf.net with SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment, or (3) the manual Sheet-based notification fallback that is in effect today. Each must pass a manually-delivered test under minimal-rights consent before any env var is set. Until then INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK / INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO stay unset on every environment and /api/intake keeps reporting notification_status=dry_run_not_configured. Automatic notifications stay disabled. The prepared Apps Script MailApp source remains in-tree as a reference artefact only (docs/apps-script-mail-notification.gs + docs/appsscript.mail-notification.json); see docs/apps-script-mail-notification.future.md and docs/intake-minimal-notification-design.md for the full rollback / decision records. Production was never enabled on this branch and is unchanged.

controls.directory_master_blocked: enforced (forbidden_targets + tab-prefix check on both ends)
controls.shared_secret: header x-esrf-intake-secret AND body shared_secret for Apps Script doPost
controls.method_handling: POST-only; OPTIONS preflight; 405 for other verbs
controls.turnstile: honoured when TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY set; warning emitted otherwise (lab leaves it disabled)
controls.rate_limit: TODO — runtime-dependent (Workers KV binding or Cloudflare WAF rate-limit rule on /api/intake)
controls.input_validation: per-mode required fields, ISO-3166 country, email shape, mandatory editorial + GDPR consents; HTML/control-char strip; length caps 600 / 2000
controls.minimal_notification: assertNotificationSafe enforces FORBIDDEN_NOTIFY_KEYS on both live + dry-run paths
controls.no_secrets_leak: secrets read from env only; upstream errors flattened to status code; no stack traces in responses
controls.cors: Vary: origin on every response; preflight only for allowed origins
controls.default_safe: dry-run by default when sheet/notify webhooks unset
controls.official_identity: office@esrf.net surfaced as official production recipient via OFFICE_IDENTITY constant; ai.agent.wm@gmail.com listed as non-production and hard-blocked by Apps Script FORBIDDEN_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS deny-list

productionBlockers: Google Apps Script MailApp mailrelay route is DISABLED / DELIVERY-UNCONFIRMED as of 2026-04-26 (rollback event evt_unconfirmed_google_mailrelay_disabled_20260426_1401, operator probe sub_moftdrju_f8lk). The route MUST NOT be re-enabled in its current form.

Outlook / Microsoft 365 connector authorization for office@esrf.net was REJECTED on 2026-04-26 at 14:21 because the consent screen requested broad / full mailbox access instead of a minimal send-only scope (decision event evt_outlook_broad_scope_rejected_20260426_1421). Refusing was the correct security decision. The broad-scope Outlook connector path MUST NOT be re-attempted; if Microsoft consent again surfaces only broad / full mailbox access, the Outlook connector route stays rejected.

Recommended next notification routes are minimal-rights only: (1) Microsoft Graph app registration with send-only Mail.Send for office@esrf.net (no Mail.Read / Mail.ReadWrite / full_access_as_app, narrowed via Exchange Online New-ApplicationAccessPolicy to office@esrf.net only), (2) authenticated SMTP / mailrelay for office@esrf.net with SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment verified end-to-end, or (3) manual Sheet-based notification (current default). Each must pass a manually-delivered test under minimal-rights consent before INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK / INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO are set on any Cloudflare Pages environment.

Cloudflare Pages preview secrets (INTAKE_SHEET_WEBHOOK_URL + SHEETS_WEBHOOK_SECRET) are configured for sheet intake; INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK and INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO are intentionally unset following the 2026-04-26 rollback (evt_unconfirmed_google_mailrelay_disabled_20260426_1401) and the same-day Outlook rejection (evt_outlook_broad_scope_rejected_20260426_1421).

INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO must be set to office@esrf.net (or another office@esrf.net-controlled inbox) and only together with INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK pointing at a confirmed minimal-rights relay (Microsoft Graph send-only Mail.Send, OR authenticated SMTP with SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment).
Redactie sign-off on activation gate in docs/intake-lab-test-report-2026-04-25.md §6b.
Optional: rate-limit (Workers KV binding INTAKE_RATELIMIT or Cloudflare WAF rule).

mailRelayRollback.testedRoute: Google Apps Script MailApp.sendEmail deployment, hit via Cloudflare Pages Preview INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK
actionsTaken: Cloudflare Pages Preview env vars INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK and INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO removed / disabled.
Google Apps Script MailApp deployment treated as inert (no Cloudflare env var points at it).

Apps Script MailApp route marked disabled / delivery-unconfirmed in docs/apps-script-mail-notification.future.md, docs/intake-minimal-notification-design.md, docs/intake-backend.md and docs/validation-lab.md.
mailRelayRollback.sheetIntakeImpact: none — LAB_* rows continue to append on every successful submission via the spreadsheet-only Apps Script.
mailRelayRollback.statusFlagAfterRollback: minimal-notification-design-ready-not-enabled (unchanged — was never flipped to enabled because step 7 of the activation checklist, delivered email at office@esrf.net, was never reached).

recommendedNextRoute.channel: Minimal-rights only: Microsoft Graph app registration with send-only Mail.Send (no Mail.Read / Mail.ReadWrite / full_access_as_app, mailbox-scoped via Exchange Online New-ApplicationAccessPolicy) for office@esrf.net, OR authenticated SMTP / mailrelay for office@esrf.net with SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment, OR manual Sheet-based notification (current default).
recommendedNextRoute.preconditionBeforeEnabling: Operator must manually send a test message through the candidate minimal-rights relay and visually confirm it arrives at the office@esrf.net inbox AND that the consent scope is send-only (no broad mailbox access). Only after that delivered-test confirmation may INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK and INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO be set on the Cloudflare Pages Preview project. Production env vars stay untouched until a second delivered-test confirmation under production identity.
recommendedNextRoute.outlookConnectorBroadScopeStatus: REJECTED on 2026-04-26 (decision event evt_outlook_broad_scope_rejected_20260426_1421) — see outlookConnectorRejection block.

outlookConnectorRejection.trigger: Operator opened the Microsoft consent flow to authorize the connector.
outlookConnectorRejection.consentScreenRequested: Broad / full mailbox access (read mail / mailbox-wide permissions), not a minimal send-only scope.
outlookConnectorRejection.operatorAction: Authorization REJECTED at the consent screen. No tokens were issued. No connector was authorized. No client secret was stored anywhere (not in this repo, not in wrangler.toml, not in Cloudflare Pages env vars).
outlookConnectorRejection.securityRationale: The notification channel only needs to send a single minimal, PII-free operational ping (the wire-level contract is defined in NOTIFICATION_CONTRACT in functions/api/intake.js and locked in docs/intake-minimal-notification-design.md). Granting broad / full mailbox access would let a relay compromise read the entire office@esrf.net mailbox (submitter correspondence, foundation mail, password-reset mails) — none of which the relay needs. Refusing the broad consent keeps the blast radius bounded to 'send one minimal mail' if the relay is ever compromised.
actionsTaken: No new Cloudflare Pages env var was created.
INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK and INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO remain disabled / unset on every environment (already unset after evt_unconfirmed_google_mailrelay_disabled_20260426_1401 earlier the same day).
Decision recorded in docs/intake-minimal-notification-design.md, docs/apps-script-mail-notification.future.md, docs/intake-backend.md and docs/validation-lab.md.
outlookConnectorRejection.sheetIntakeImpact: none — LAB_* rows continue to append on every successful submission via the spreadsheet-only Apps Script.

recommendedNextRoutes.channel: Microsoft Graph app registration with send-only Mail.Send as office@esrf.net.
recommendedNextRoutes.consentScopeMustBe: Mail.Send only — NOT Mail.Read, NOT Mail.ReadWrite, NOT Mail.ReadWrite.Shared, NOT full_access_as_app.
recommendedNextRoutes.mailboxScopeNarrowing: Exchange Online New-ApplicationAccessPolicy -AccessRight RestrictAccess -PolicyScopeGroupId office@esrf.net (so the app can only send AS office@esrf.net and cannot touch any other mailbox).
recommendedNextRoutes.preconditionBeforeEnabling: Operator must manually send a Graph sendMail call from the candidate app and visually confirm the test message arrives at office@esrf.net AND that the granted scope is exactly Mail.Send. If admin consent for Mail.Send cannot be granted in isolation, this route stays rejected.

recommendedNextRoutes.channel: Authenticated SMTP submission / mailrelay for office@esrf.net.
recommendedNextRoutes.preconditionBeforeEnabling: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC must be aligned for the From: office@esrf.net envelope. Verify with a manual test send and inspection of receiving mailbox headers (Authentication-Results: spf=pass dkim=pass dmarc=pass). Only after that delivered-and-aligned confirmation may INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK and INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO be set on Cloudflare Pages Preview.

recommendedNextRoutes.channel: Manual Sheet-based notification — redactie monitors LAB_* tabs directly in the Drive spreadsheet.
recommendedNextRoutes.preconditionBeforeEnabling: Already in effect today. No automatic email channel; INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK and INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO stay unset. This is the default-safe state and the fallback if Microsoft Graph send-only and authenticated SMTP routes are not approved.

sheetMonitoringDecision.selectedRoute: Manual Sheet-based notification — redactie monitors the LAB_* tabs directly in the Drive spreadsheet on a periodic cadence.
sheetMonitoringDecision.userConfirmation: User explicitly confirmed that periodic Sheet monitoring is acceptable as the operational notification mode for the current lab phase.
sheetMonitoringDecision.procedureLocation: LAB_Instructions tab in the same Drive spreadsheet (ESRF Directory CRM - actuele brondata 2026-04-24, id 1jGDFjTq5atrFSe3avjj4AflUo1SLPKAmkT_MIpH6z1g). Contains the redactie monitor procedure: cadence, who-watches-which-tab, and how to acknowledge a row.
sheetMonitoringDecision.automaticEmailStatus: DISABLED. INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK and INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO remain unset on every Cloudflare Pages environment. /api/intake keeps reporting notification_status=dry_run_not_configured. MINIMAL_NOTIFICATION_DESIGN_STATUS stays minimal-notification-design-ready-not-enabled.
sheetMonitoringDecision.preconditionToReEnableAutomaticEmail: A minimal-rights Microsoft 365 Graph send-only Mail.Send route (no Mail.Read / Mail.ReadWrite / full_access_as_app, mailbox-scoped via Exchange Online ApplicationAccessPolicy to office@esrf.net) — OR equivalent authenticated SMTP / mailrelay with SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment — must be approved AND must pass a manually-delivered test under minimal-rights consent before any env var is set.
sheetMonitoringDecision.sheetIntakeImpact: none — LAB_* rows continue to append on every successful submission via the spreadsheet-only Apps Script.
sheetMonitoringDecision.statusFlagAfterDecision: minimal-notification-design-ready-not-enabled (unchanged). Automatic notifications stay disabled. Module status flipped to sheet-monitoring-active-email-disabled to reflect the operational mode.
sheetMonitoringDecision.supersedes: Implements route (3) 'manual-sheet-based-notification' from outlookConnectorRejection.recommendedNextRoutes as the active operational mode for this lab phase.

officialIdentity.note: office@esrf.net is the only documented production recipient. ai.agent.wm@gmail.com may exist as a temporary / non-production context (e.g. legacy Google Sheets connector identity in agent tooling) but must never back the production webhook or be configured as INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO.

modules.purpose: Lab-versie van de automatische intakeflow: backend POST /api/intake geeft een expliciete workflow (received → validated → stored_or_dry_run → notification_prepared_or_sent → next_required_action) terug, schrijft uitsluitend naar LAB_Intake_Submissions, LAB_Editorial_Intake, LAB_Place_Candidates, LAB_Backend_Log en LAB_Workflow_Events in de bestaande Drive-spreadsheet (id 1jGDFjTq5atrFSe3avjj4AflUo1SLPKAmkT_MIpH6z1g), en stuurt een PII-vrije notificatie. Directory_Master wordt nooit automatisch aangepast.

previewTestRoute.purpose: Preview-only single-write probe so ONE controlled lab-write can be validated end-to-end without re-opening /api/intake to general traffic. Production deploys short-circuit to 404 before any handler logic runs.
guardrails: Preview-only: production environment (CF_PAGES_BRANCH=main or unset) returns 404.
POST-only; OPTIONS preflight; 405 for other verbs.
Required prefix 'ESRF Lab Test' on contact.organisation AND contact.name (case-insensitive, prefix-only).
Forces meta.environment to 'TEST/VALIDATIE'; defence-in-depth re-check after sanitisation.
Live write requires BOTH INTAKE_SHEET_WEBHOOK_URL and SHEETS_WEBHOOK_SECRET; missing either flips to dry-run.

Notification disabled — INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK / INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO are deliberately ignored on this route; notification_status is always 'disabled_for_intake_test' and notification_sent is always false.
Writes only to LAB_* tabs; Directory_Master forbidden via assertLabPayloadSafe + tab-prefix re-check.
Same payload validation, body-size cap (64 KiB), origin allowlist, and JSON-shape checks as /api/intake.
Generic JSON errors only — no upstream stack traces, no env-var names, no shared-secret reflection.
previewTestRoute.middlewareBypass: /api/intake-test is on functions/_middleware.js BOT_FILTER_BYPASS_PATHS so an authorised operator can run a single curl POST against the Preview deploy without being 403'd by the UA filter. /api/intake itself is NOT bypassed; production HTML pages and the production intake remain fully protected.
previewTestRoute.tests: /functions/api/intake-test.test.mjs (method handling, preview-only guard, production blocked, lab_test marker, ESRF Lab Test prefix, LAB-only targets, Directory_Master forbidden, notification disabled, secrets-missing dry-run, success path with mocked sheet upstream, generic error messages).

labWriteEvidence.note: First successful sheet-only LAB write via /api/intake-test. Confirms end-to-end Apps Script path under office@esrf.net Workspace project. Directory_Master untouched; notification path remains disabled on this route.

googleMailRelayProbeEvidence.testedRoute: Google Apps Script MailApp.sendEmail deployment via Cloudflare Pages Preview INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK
googleMailRelayProbeEvidence.actionTaken: Removed/disabled INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK and INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO on the Cloudflare Pages Preview project. Marked the Google Apps Script MailApp route as disabled / delivery-unconfirmed. Sheet intake remains active.
googleMailRelayProbeEvidence.note: Operator probe confirmed that the Cloudflare backend's notification dispatch reached the relay, but no message arrived in the office@esrf.net inbox during the verification window. Recommended next route is a minimal-rights route (Microsoft Graph send-only Mail.Send, OR authenticated SMTP with SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment, OR manual Sheet-based notification), enabled only after a manually-delivered test message is confirmed under minimal-rights consent.

outlookConnectorRejectionEvidence.consentScreenRequested: Broad / full mailbox access (read mail / mailbox-wide permissions), not a minimal send-only scope.
outlookConnectorRejectionEvidence.operatorAction: Authorization REJECTED at the Microsoft consent screen.
outlookConnectorRejectionEvidence.sheetIntakeImpact: none — LAB_* rows continue to append on every successful submission via the spreadsheet-only Apps Script.
outlookConnectorRejectionEvidence.note: Refusing broad / full mailbox consent is the correct security decision: the operational notification channel only needs Mail.Send. Granting full-mailbox access would expand a relay compromise to the entire office@esrf.net mailbox. Recommended next routes are minimal-rights only — see outlookConnectorRejection.recommendedNextRoutes for the canonical list (Microsoft Graph send-only Mail.Send, authenticated SMTP with SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment, or manual Sheet-based notification).

operationalQueue.note: While automatic email is disabled, the redactie watches the queue tabs on a periodic cadence and follows the procedure documented in LAB_Instructions. LAB_Instructions is a procedure tab (read by humans), not a write target of /api/intake — the backend never writes to it; it is excluded from the automatic write surface in the same way Directory_Master is excluded from automatic modification.

envVars: INTAKE_SHEET_WEBHOOK_URL (alias: SHEETS_WEBHOOK_URL, legacy: GOOGLE_SHEET_WEBHOOK_URL) — set on Preview, sheet intake active.
SHEETS_WEBHOOK_SECRET (alias: INTAKE_SHEET_WEBHOOK_SECRET) — set on Preview, sheet intake active.

INTAKE_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK — DISABLED / UNSET on every environment after rollback event evt_unconfirmed_google_mailrelay_disabled_20260426_1401 and the same-day Outlook rejection (evt_outlook_broad_scope_rejected_20260426_1421). Future value must point at a MINIMAL-RIGHTS relay only: Microsoft Graph app registration with send-only Mail.Send for office@esrf.net (NOT Mail.Read / Mail.ReadWrite / full_access_as_app), OR authenticated SMTP / mailrelay for office@esrf.net with SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment. NOT the Google Apps Script MailApp route. NOT Gmail. NOT a broad-scope Outlook / Microsoft 365 connector.

INTAKE_NOTIFY_TO — DISABLED / UNSET on every environment after rollback event evt_unconfirmed_google_mailrelay_disabled_20260426_1401 (and confirmed unchanged after evt_outlook_broad_scope_rejected_20260426_1421). Documented default when re-enabled (under a minimal-rights relay only): office@esrf.net.
exitCriteria: Backend response bevat een complete workflow met steps + next_required_action.
Sheet payload draagt target_prefix=LAB_ en noemt Directory_Master als verboden target; assertLabPayloadSafe weigert elke afwijkende vorm vóór de fetch.
Notification message bevat geen PII en geen editorial body — verifieerbaar via assertNotificationSafe en de bijbehorende tests.
Notification channel is gedocumenteerd als ESRF mailnotificatie / mailrelay-webhook (geen Gmail-specifieke wording); recipient (indien gezet) is office@esrf.net.

Apps Script reference (docs/apps-script-intake-webhook.gs) weigert niet-LAB-targets en Directory_Master, heeft een opt-in MailApp-route (NOTIFY_TO) die alleen activeert wanneer expliciet ingesteld, en blokkeert ai.agent.wm@gmail.com via FORBIDDEN_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS.
OFFICE_IDENTITY (official_recipient=office@esrf.net) is zichtbaar in storage_architecture en getest.

Productie blijft geblokkeerd zolang: (a) Apps Script niet onder office@esrf.net draait, (b) Cloudflare Pages preview secrets niet zijn gezet, (c) §6b activation gate niet is afgevinkt door de redactie.

node functions/api/intake.test.mjs slaagt voor alle dry-run, editorial-only, combined, place-candidate, recipient-metadata, no-Gmail-wording, security-gate (Directory_Master refusal, missing/invalid secret, dry-run default, minimal notification, office identity, POST-only, payload size, required consent) routes.

node functions/api/intake-test.test.mjs slaagt voor alle preview-only / production-blocked / lab_test-marker / ESRF Lab Test prefix / LAB-only / Directory_Master-forbidden / notification-disabled / secrets-missing dry-run / mocked success-path routes; node functions/_middleware.test.mjs bevestigt dat /api/intake-test wél en /api/intake niet op de bot-filter-bypass-lijst staan.

modules.title: Redactieformulier — leesbaar review-formulier boven de Sheet (validatie-only)
modules.purpose: Hidden, noindex redactie-UI die LAB_Intake_Submissions / LAB_Editorial_Intake-rijen één voor één toont als leesbare kaarten met procesgang, status, herinnering, volgende actie, deadline en review-notities. De Drive-spreadsheet blijft single source of truth en audit-spoor; deze pagina schrijft nooit naar Sheet, GitHub, e-mail of Directory_Master. Lokale voorbeelddata in de browser; export levert een veilige JSON of tekst-samenvatting die de redactie handmatig in de juiste LAB_*-rij plakt.
modules.tests: /scripts/redactie_validation.test.mjs (noindex meta, safety copy, sample records both types render, export excludes contact email by default, validation-lab manifest includes module).
exitCriteria: Pagina bevat noindex,nofollow en validatie-banner met 'Niet publiceren', 'Directory_Master niet aanpassen', 'Preview pas na akkoord'.
Linker lijst toont zowel organisatie-aanmelding als editorial bijdrage uit de lokale voorbeelddata; rechter paneel toont leesbare cards en een eenvoudig review-formulier.
Export sluit standaard contact-e-mail en raw payload uit; alleen na expliciete toggle 'Toon contactgegevens' wordt contact_internal in de export opgenomen.
Geen Google Sheets, GitHub of e-mail call vanuit de browser; export is uitsluitend kopieerbaar (klembord).
Geen publieke navigatie, footer-link of sitemap-vermelding; pagina is niet vanaf productie bereikbaar.

modules.title: Lab-only controlled promotion: approved LAB_* row → editorial draft / directory candidate
modules.purpose: Convert redactie-approved rows from LAB_Editorial_Intake / LAB_Intake_Submissions / LAB_Place_Candidates into local repo artefacts (editorials/drafts/lab/<slug>.md and data/candidates/directory-candidates.lab.json) for review on the test/regional-editorial-contributor-intake branch via GitHub branch preview. Never writes Directory_Master, never runs on main, never sends notifications, never auto-publishes to live.
guards: ESRF_LAB_PROMOTE=1 must be set; otherwise refuse.
Current git branch (or ESRF_BRANCH override) must NOT be main / master / production / prod.
Source tab must be one of LAB_Intake_Submissions / LAB_Editorial_Intake / LAB_Place_Candidates.
Intake row review_status must be in {approved_for_candidate, approved_for_directory_candidate, approved_lab_promote}; assigned_to and review_notes_internal must be non-empty.
Editorial row editorial_status must be in {approved_for_draft, approved_for_editorial_draft, approved_lab_promote}; review_notes_internal must be non-empty.
Output dict must not contain forbidden PII keys (contact_email, contact_phone, email, phone, raw_payload_json, shared_secret).
Filenames are slugified and refuse path-traversal sequences.
exitCriteria: python3 -m unittest scripts.lab_promote.tests.test_lab_promote -v passes (26 tests) covering guards (lab flag, branch, Directory_Master refusal, source tab, status, required review fields, PII), transforms (PII strip, front-matter flags, slug safety, dedupe), and CLI happy path / refusal paths.
scripts.lab_promote.cli runs in dry-run mode against fixtures without any network or Sheet call.
Emitted draft markdown carries status=lab-draft, auto_i18n=false, auto_publish=false, preview_only=true and contains no contact_email / contact_name / contact_phone.
Directory candidate file carries auto_promote_to_directory_master=false and is written under data/candidates/, not Directory_Master.

docs/lab-promotion.md documents the controlled flow Form → LAB Sheet → redaction review → approved row → generated draft/candidate → GitHub branch/preview → human approval → main/live, plus the exact manual test procedure for one approved row.
